variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 560 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 560 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 560 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 348.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 338.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 214.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 28.0 mm
